known_anomalies.name: repositoriesWithNullPluginCount
known_anomalies.reason: Legacy discovered repository rows that have not had plugin counts backfilled yet.

known_anomalies.name: repositoriesWithUntrimmedDescriptions
known_anomalies.reason: Existing generated descriptions contain source whitespace that should be cleaned in the ingestion pipeline.

known_anomalies.name: caseInsensitiveRepositoryCollisions
known_anomalies.reason: Existing catalog contains case-only owner/repo collisions that need canonicalization.
